title: FetchTicketInput
description: The INPUT contract of the `fetch_ticket` scripted step (workflow authoring v2, walking skeleton). Declared via `@register_step(input_schema=...)` and surfaced read-only in the editor inspector as the step's CONSUMES. A step's `with:` block is validated against this. `ticket_id` is optional: when omitted the step falls back to the workflow's target ticket.

ticket_id.description: The ticket to fetch. Optional — falls back to the workflow's target ticket (`${{ inputs.ticket_id }}`) when not supplied.
